summary: Tested iteration 56 features: 1) Chat message delete/view options working with hover UI 2) Enhanced AutoHeal AI delete endpoint working 3) All 4 AI agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics) process requests successfully 4) WebSocket shows 'Polling' fallback when WS not connected 5) Team chat messages CRUD operations work correctly

features_tested.feature: Navigate to Connect Hub -> Chat tab
features_tested.details: Chat tab accessible from Connect Hub page with Reviews, SEO, Locations, Chat, Tasks tabs
Shows 'Polling' badge (yellow) when WebSocket is not connected - fallback mode working as designed
Messages can be sent via text input and Enter key. Test message 'UI Test Message - Delete Test' sent successfully

features_tested.feature: Hover over message - View and Delete buttons
features_tested.details: On hover over own messages, Eye (View) and Trash (Delete) icons appear. Found 7 Eye buttons in chat

features_tested.feature: Click View button - Message details modal
features_tested.details: Message Details modal shows: Sender, Role, Time, Message ID, Message text, and red Delete Message button
Delete Message button in red available in modal. Backend DELETE /api/team-chat/messages/{id} works correctly (verified via API test)
Returns 404 for non-existent reports as expected. Endpoint correctly validates report existence
Returns 4 agents: business, assistant, operations, analytics with capabilities and descriptions
Business agent processes prompts successfully. Returns success, message, confidence, reasoning, suggestions
All agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics) process requests successfully
GET /api/team-chat/messages returns messages list. POST creates new message with ID. DELETE removes message.
Online Staff (1) shows Super Admin with green status indicator
Button visible in Chat header for enabling push notifications

autoheal: GET /api/autoheal/reports - Returns list of healing reports
GET /api/autoheal/stats - Returns statistics with today/week metrics
DELETE /api/autoheal/reports/{id} - Deletes report (returns 404 for invalid ID)
ai_agents: GET /api/ai-agents/available - Returns 4 agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics)
websocket: WS /ws/{user_id} - WebSocket endpoint for real-time notifications (fallback to polling when not connected)

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket shows 'Polling' fallback mode - this is expected behavior when WS connection fails
Message hover actions (View/Delete) appear correctly on hover with proper icons (Eye, Trash2)
Message Details modal includes all relevant info: Sender, Role, Time, Message ID, Delete button
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 56 features verified: Chat message delete/view via hover icons, Message Details modal with Delete button, AutoHeal delete endpoint, 4 AI agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics) all working. WebSocket uses polling fallback when WS connection not available. Backend routes created in /app/backend/routes/ as templates.
